description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Medical Disease Prediction using SHAP and Streamlit

A production-ready Machine Learning pipeline for Diabetes prediction. This project demonstrates advanced software engineering practices in ML, featuring custom Scikit-Learn transformers, modular architecture, automated outlier handling, and hyperparameter tuning using GridSearchCV.
A Julia machine learning framework

TEMPO establishes a clinically grounded, mechanistic, and predictive modeling framework that integrates spatial single-cell data with systems biology and machine learning to advance precision oncology in TNBC.

This project delivers a complete, end-to-end churn intelligence system from raw CSV files to an interactive Power BI dashboard and a machine learning prediction model, using a SQL first, analytics engineering approach.
AI-based dyslexia risk detection framework using handwriting images, synthetic sentence-level data, eye-tracking signals, classical machine learning, deep learning, and multimodal fusion models.
Explainable, fair, and observable machine learning framework for hospital readmission prediction using MIMIC-IV.
Statistical audit and Machine Learning analysis of workplace pay equity. Investigating gender bias in salary structures and implementing ethical AI frameworks for HR decision-making.
A data analysis project on toxic content detection using machine learning, focused on improving accuracy, fairness, and interpretability across different labeling frameworks.

MedFusion is a healthcare diagnosis framework that makes disease prediction based on symptom and medical image analysis. It uses both machine learning and deep learning techniques (Convolutional Neural Network). This application assists in early diagnosis through an easy-to-use interface and is meant for educational purposes only.
A curated list of tools, frameworks, platforms, and resources for Machine Learning Operations (MLOps).
Framework developed for building machine learning datasets from PAM recordings collected during seismic surveys for marine mammal environmental monitoring.

LAB-Score is a safety-gated genomic framework for prioritizing lactic acid bacteria candidates using genome annotation, AMR/safety screening, functional trait panels, CAZyme profiling, machine-learning interpretation, and interactive strain-level radar reports.
Comprehensive framework of Machine Learning and Blockchain to detect and prevent fraud in carbon credit market

Cognitive Engine is a modular AI agent framework for building intelligent, decision-driven systems. It combines rule-based logic, machine learning, and large language models (LLMs) to enable adaptable and extensible agents across multiple domains.
VIRO: A Machine Learning Framework for HumanVirus ProteinProtein Interaction Prediction

A comprehensive framework for interactive machine learning that allows users to actively participate in the learning process through feedback and corrections. This project demonstrates various active learning strategies and provides both programmatic and interactive interfaces for experimentation.
Asset Integrity Engineer bridging RBI decision frameworks, data engineering, and applied machine learning through transparent automation.
An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

Es un framework avanzado para la ejecucin de pipelines de datos que combina automatizacin, escalabilidad y flexibilidad. Diseado para simplificar la gestin de flujos de trabajo complejos de datos, desde ETL tradicionales hasta pipelines de Machine Learning.
Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

Authored a research paper developing a methodology to integrate machine learning return forecasts into the Black-Litterman portfolio construction framework, with a full Python backtesting implementation across an 11-asset multi-asset universe (2010-2024).

A simple AI-powered voice chatbot built entirely with Python and NumPy. The project, accepts both text and speech input, and responds using text-to-speech. It is a great beginner-friendly project for understanding natural language processing, speech recognition, and neural networks without using heavy machine learning frameworks.
Machine Learning based Dynamic Portfolio Optimization & Backtesting Framework for Indian Equities.

AI-powered Road Accident Risk Prediction system using Machine Learning. Predicts low, medium, and high risk based on traffic and environmental data. Includes XGBoost model, evaluation metrics, and SHAP-based explainability for better insights.
Equitrain: A Unified Framework for Training and Fine-tuning Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials

Computer Engineering student working on machine learning systems, web, and mobile applications. I build end-to-end solutions from data processing and modeling to API deployment, using Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, and modern web/mobile frameworks, with a focus on practical, real-world projects.

Built an Explainable AI system for fake job posting detection using TF-IDF text features and credibility metadata. Trained and compared Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM, and stacking ensemble models. Used SHAP for model interpretability and deployed a real-time Streamlit application for fraud detection.

Wildfire detection was improved using hybrid deep learning and machine learning models. DenseNet121 + SVM achieved the highest accuracy of 97.98%, followed by InceptionV3 + SVM with 97.87%. The proposed framework provides accurate, reliable, and scalable wildfire detection for real-time monitoring and early warning systems.
A Backend-Agnostic Machine Learning Framework for .NET
Decentralized machine learning framework
Machine Learning Framework for Taxonomic Classification of Soil Metagenomic Fragments using Canonical k-mer profiles and XGBoost
Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)
GOAL (General Open Atomistic Laboratory) is a Python framework for training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) on atomistic systems.

This project develops a comprehensive Machine Learning framework for predicting Peak Particle Velocity (PPV) from controlled blasting operations in Indian coal mines. It extends the traditional CMRI empirical formula with modern ML models, SHAP explainability, multi-output prediction, and a real-time safety intelligence dashboard.

Physics-informed machine learning framework to correct DFT (PBE) band gap errors using delta learning. Combines Magpie descriptors, PCA, Random Forest, and GPR to achieve ~0.55 eV RMSE, enabling accurate and scalable semiconductor materials discovery.

A machine learning framework for accurate low-frequency mtDNA mutation detection by identifying and removing NUMT-derived artifacts. Integrates DNA-RNA dual-omics and multi-dimensional features to robustly distinguish genuine mitochondrial mutations from nuclear mitochondrial DNA segments (NUMTs) contamination.

This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods
A comprehensive framework for automated machine learning with interpretability, combining TPOT (AutoML) with multiple explainability methods including SHAP, LIME, and Integrated Gradients.

Python framework for building, validating, and backtesting quantitative trading strategies with machine learning, featuring robust data analysis, realistic backtesting, and comprehensive risk analytics.
Tsetlin Machine-based framework for analyzing transcriptomic crosstalk. Uses interpretable rule-based learning, enabling transparent and biologically meaningful insights beyond black-box models.
AI-driven Automated Machine Learning Framework for Materials Science
Traffic and incident prediction framework using machine learning and data fusion techniques.

AI-powered system for early stroke prediction that combines machine learning, deep learning, and explainable AI techniques. This comprehensive framework enhances predictive accuracy while ensuring clinical interpretability and fairness in healthcare applications.

CircumSpectrum is a flux-based framework that converts bulk and single-cell RNA-seq data into metabolic fingerprints using genome-scale models and machine learning. It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.

Engineered a proactive security framework for critical infrastructure using network segmentation and machine learning-driven anomaly detection to preemptively isolate grid attacks and prevent outages.
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

ARCO (Algorithms for Recognition of Chemical Objects) is a Computer-Assisted Structure Elucidation (CASE) framework that integrates machine learning and rule-based chemical constraints to generate and rank plausible molecular structures from infrared (IR) spectral data and molecular formula information.
A framework for motion planning using generative machine learning methods

AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.
Custom made machine learning library with various test. Only uses numpy for faster calculations
APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

QuantYogChain: Blockchain-Enabled Federated Quantum Machine Learning Framework for Secure YogAI-based Personalized Healthcare using wearable biosignal data (HRV, EDA, SpO2, Sleep). Includes VQC models, federated learning simulation, and blockchain-based aggregation.

CardioTwin AI is a personalized digital twin framework designed for predictive cardiac health and diagnostic optimization. It integrates a 3D heart model developed in Blender with data-driven machine learning to visualize and analyze heart health. The platform features an AI-powered chatbot within a custom user interface.
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework
Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python
Neural Decoding of Imagined Music: A Machine Learning Framework for EEG-Based Audio Feature Reconstruction
Machine learning framework built in C++
A hybrid log classification framework that combines regex heuristics, machine learning, and an LLM path for source-specific log analysis.
High-performance, strictly-typed API framework for computational physics and scientific machine learning.

This project aims to provide a solution for automatic Image background removal and replacement using basic HTML, CSS, Java Script for the frontend. Python based framework such as Flask for the Backend. On machine learning part it uses Rembg library based on the U2-Net architecture for background removal.
Machine Learning Framework to Identify Coral Bacteria Associated with Thermal Resilience
A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations
Modular Python framework for quantum machine learning using PennyLane, including variational classifiers, quantum kernels, and reproducible workflows for hybrid quantumclassical experiments.

Engineered a machine learning pipeline achieving 85% accuracy in predicting customer booking behavior, and a scalable demand forecasting framework supporting capacity planning across 1,500+ daily premium lounge departures at Heathrow Terminal 3.

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations
A Convolutional Neural Network based framework for building medical image analysis models by combining different features, blocks and layers of machine learning

An interactive, browser-based visualization of a single-layer perceptron learning decision boundaries in real time.  Built using vanilla JavaScript, this project demonstrates the fundamentals of binary classification and machine learning  without any frameworks.
A translation-aware framework for alignment-free phylogenetics using machine learning
Hybrid Rule-Based Machine Learning and Deep Learning framework for real-time financial fraud detection in transaction streams.
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.
Translation exploration with Transformers and Machine Learning Experimentation Platfroms

This repository contains a hybrid, risk-aware data tokenization system designed to evaluate, encrypt, and securely store sensitive information.  Core Technologies: Python, Flask (Web Framework), MongoDB, Machine Learning (Scikit-Learn), and Cryptography (Fernet).

Framework modular de inteligncia preditiva para anlise de sustentabilidade fiscal e risco soberano. Integra modelos de Machine Learning (Random Forest) e econometria avanada (SPJ) com dados em tempo real da FRED e BCB. Base tcnica da tese de uriks Souza Davalo

A real-time Face Emotion Recognition (FER) system that uses a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to detect mental stress levels during online learning environments. The system captures emotional cues from facial expressions to determine stress, enhancing digital mental health monitoring.
Cross-domain machine learning framework for breast cancer histopathology and phishing website detection with explainability and robustness analysis.
A complete collection of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Science projects built using Python and modern AI frameworks.
This project leverages the high-performance computational power of NumPy alongside the scalable machine learning framework TensorFlow to build a robust end-to-end data pipeline and predictive model.
This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

An end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline developed to predict customer churn in the telecom industry. Features a risk segmentation framework (High/Medium/Low) and an interactive Plotly dashboard to drive data-informed retention strategies.

The model integrates 252,056 field records from 18,004 sites across China to build a multi-source datadriven machine learning framework for wheat yield prediction. Based on this model, N, P, and K fertilization strategies were optimized for agronomic (AOF), economic (EOF), and environmentalsocial (ESOF) benefits.

This repository contains a set of CMSSW modules and helper scripts designed to preprocess particle physics data (specifically from MINIAOD files) into flat `TTree` ROOT files. The resulting files are optimized for subsequent analysis, particularly for training machine learning models. The framework is configured to handle AK15 jets with condor
A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations
AI-powered career guidance system built with Django REST Framework and machine learning.
Machine Learning driven quantitative trading framework for cross-sectional equity Alpha discovery.
HiveMind, a decentralized training framework designed to coordinate heterogeneous consumer hardware for machine learning tasks over local networks.

This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

This AI framework predicts cancer survivorship using clinical healthcare data. The system trains multiple machine learning models, deploying the best performer via a hospital-style dashboard. Medical staff can input patient parameters to receive instant predictions and analytics, transforming complex clinical data into actionable insights.

Secure Federated Learning Framework for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a privacy-preserving and attack-resilient distributed learning framework designed for collaborative intelligence in UAV networks. The framework enables multiple UAVs to train shared machine learning models without exchanging raw data.

This study proposes a machine learning framework using EEG data to classify stress and relaxation states. EEG signals are preprocessed to remove noise and segmented for analysis. A CNN model is developed for accurate classification, while Grad-CAM provides interpretability, helping understand neural responses.

A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources for Artificial Intelligence (AI). This list covers everything from foundational machine learning and deep learning to specialized areas like NLP, computer vision, and AI ethics.
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

A smart retail analytics framework built with Streamlit. Uses K-Means for RFM segmentation and FP-Growth for predictive basket analysis. Eliminates guesswork with transparent metrics (Lift/Confidence) and identifies "Revenue at Risk." Features dynamic thresholding to uncover hidden VIP patterns. Optimized for scalable e-commerce intelligence.

A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.

Ununennium (Element 119, the next alkali metal) represents the cutting edge of satellite imagery machine learning. This library provides a unified, GPU-first framework for end-to-end Earth observation workflows, from cloud-native data access through model training to deployment.
Machine learning framework for pre-manufacturing jaggery color prediction using soil and water parameters
Node.js bindings for [MLX](https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx) - Apple's array framework for machine learning on Apple Silicon.
An integrative machine learning, explainable AI, and molecular simulation framework for the discovery of selective SIRT1 inhibitors against Triple Negative Breast Cancer
